title: Ubiquiti UVC-G6-PTZ, UniFi Protect outdoor 8MP PTZ camera, black
description: Ubiquiti UVC-G6-PTZ-B is a PTZ (pan-tilt-zoom) camera in black color featuring dual lenses (4.46mm / 16.3mm) with a horizontal field of view of 26.6 ° / 109.9 ° and 8MP resolution for clear image capture. Thanks to the dual-lens setup, the camera offers 5Ã optical zoom and is also equipped with a 2Ã digital zoom. It can pan horizontally up to 350 ° and tilt vertically within a 100 ° range. The camera supports two-way audio Night vision up to a distance of 30m is provided by IR LED illumination. Weather and vandal resistance are ensured by IP66 and IK4 certifications 4K (8MP) video resolution 5Ã optical zoom + 2x digital zoom IR night vision up to 30 meters Audio recording via built-in microphone Power over PoE+ Weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor use IP66 + IK04 protection Viewing angles: 109.9 ° / 26.6 ° horizontal, 56.7 ° / 15.1 ° vertical, 134.1 ° / 30.4 ° diagonal PoE injector not included in the package Device Mounting accessories
